pages.title: Attention Paper
pages.body:
This paper introduces the [[attention-mechanism]] in sequence modeling.

## Key points
- Scaled dot-product attention replaces recurrence.
- Multi-head attention lets the model attend to multiple subspaces simultaneously.

pages.title: Attention Mechanism
pages.body:
Attention lets a sequence model weight its inputs by learned relevance, replacing the fixed recurrent state of RNNs.

Introduced in context by [[attention-paper]].
